overview: Demon Bat is a Normal-class Demon/Beast monster found in Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 70 HP, 18 physical damage, 250 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 5. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack at 150% ratio (270 base damage). Sight range 600, combat radius 350. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Nightmare.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Slow Nightmare
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Slow Nightmare icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-3000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 600 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 600 units, loses target at 2000 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 350, ability check distance 400
strategies.description: Combat area radius 350. Ability check distance 400.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 400 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 600 units. Loses target at 2000 units.
